evals.prompt: Set up Storybook for this project.
evals.expected_output: Should detect the stack from package.json (framework, CSS, TypeScript, monorepo), report findings, and wait for confirmation before proceeding

assertions.text: Reads package.json to detect the stack
Reports detected framework, CSS solution, and TypeScript usage

evals.prompt: Set up Storybook. The project uses Next.js App Router with Tailwind 4.
evals.expected_output: Should apply known workarounds: separate PostCSS config, experimentalRSC, nextjs-vite framework

evals.prompt: Create stories for the existing components.
evals.expected_output: Should follow the 3-tier approach: pure components first, then routing/layout, then CMS-dependent

assertions.text: Identifies Tier 1 (pure) components as highest priority
Creates stories with at least Default variant and edge states
Uses the autodocs tag in meta

evals.prompt: Set up Storybook. There are components that use Payload CMS.
evals.expected_output: Should identify CMS-dependent components as Tier 3 and set up mock aliases in viteFinal

assertions.text: Creates mock aliases in viteFinal for Payload modules
